lines.speaker: Manni the Reveller
lines.text: Do not think me rude outerlander, but our customs forbid me talking to you. All contact with outerlanders must be vetted by our chieftain, Brundt.

lines.speaker: Manni the Reveller
lines.text: He is standing just over there. He will speak for the tribe.

lines.speaker: Manni the Reveller
lines.text: Hey! It's [Fremennik name]! Let me buy you a drink!

lines.speaker: Manni the Reveller
lines.text: There ya go! Anyone who can drink like you earns my respect!
